name: Reavis - Stickney
description_short: Reavis High School is a public secondary educational institution in District 220, not a consumer finance company. The website URL miscategorization appears to be an administrative error.
description_long: Reavis High School is a public high school operating under District 220 in Illinois. The institution serves students in grades 9-12 with the motto 'Once a Ram, Always a Ram!' based on available website content. The school provides comprehensive secondary education including standard academics, athletics, and student support services. The website functions as an informational portal for students, families, and staff, featuring announcements, event calendars, and administrative resources. This is fundamentally an educational institution, not a financial services provider of any kind. There is no evidence of consumer finance products, lending, credit services, or any payday alternative services on the website. The school offers standard high school programs including academics, athletics, food service, counseling, and health office support. The website contains no information about financial products, rates, terms, or consumer lending practices. This entry appears to be a data quality issue where a high school's domain was incorrectly classified as a payday alternative lender or financial services provider.
